goals.title: Merge upstream into current branch using history-preserving merge-ups...
goals.objective: Merge upstream into current branch using history-preserving merge-upstream workflow; protect dirty worktree state; verify with npm run check and manual CLI QA; commit/push/publish as appropriate; install on ssh mengmotaMac and prove executable works. Success criteria: merge ancestry/log evidence, dirty/stale worktree protection evidence, project validation/manual QA evidence, publish/install ssh evidence.

successCriteria.scenario: Happy path: upstream default branch is fetched and merged into current branch with no rebase/force; local fork commits are preserved.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: CLI transcript showing git remotes/branch, upstream default target, before/after rev-list counts, merge output or no-op, HEAD parent verification, and log graph.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: README-discovered upstream remote badlogic/pi-mono added; fetch/divergence evidence: /tmp/senpi-merge-upstream-20260526-112053/05-fetch-divergence-retry.txt; no-op merge/anatomy evidence: /tmp/senpi-merge-upstream-20260526-112053/06-noop-merge-verify-and-stash-pop.txt shows upstream/main fc8a1559 already ancestor, behind=0, left-right 0 479, origin/main ancestor, log graph.
successCriteria.notes: merge-upstream skill requires abort on missing upstream remote; cannot safely choose upstream repository because GitHub reports origin is not a fork and has no parent.

successCriteria.scenario: Dirty/stale state edge: pre-existing worktree changes are detected and protected before merge, or clean status is proven; no unrelated changes are swept into commit.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: CLI transcript showing git status --porcelain before merge, stash ref if used, status after stash/merge/pop, and final status limited to intentional ultragoal/release artifacts.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Dirty-state evidence: /tmp/senpi-merge-upstream-20260526-112053/03-add-upstream-and-stash.txt shows .omo/ultragoal auto-stashed to stash@{0} and clean status before fetch/merge; /tmp/senpi-merge-upstream-20260526-112053/06-noop-merge-verify-and-stash-pop.txt shows stash pop restored .omo/ultragoal only.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression and release surface: project check passes, package CLI smokes locally, publish succeeds or WebAuthn handoff is captured, and ssh mengmotaMac install runs the published executable.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Full npm run check output, local CLI smoke stdout, npm publish/release stdout or explicit WebAuthn blocker command, ssh mengmotaMac install transcript and executable version/help output.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Regression/install partial evidence: npm check /tmp/senpi-merge-upstream-20260526-112053/09-npm-run-check-after-install.txt passed; build /tmp/senpi-merge-upstream-20260526-112053/10-npm-run-build.txt passed; local CLI smoke /tmp/senpi-merge-upstream-20260526-112053/11-local-cli-smoke.txt passed; current published package install on ssh mengmotaMac /tmp/senpi-merge-upstream-20260526-112053/12-ssh-install-current-published.txt passed. Publish of a new artifact is blocked by release policy: current package version 2026.5.24 is already published, and release requires user confirmation that /cl was run on latest main before version bump/publish.
successCriteria.notes: Need user confirmation for release preflight before running release/publish flow.

goals.blockedReason: Blocked before merge: no upstream remote configured and gh repo view code-yeongyu/senpi reports isFork=false parent=null. Evidence: /tmp/senpi-merge-upstream-20260526-112053/01-validate-repo.txt and /tmp/senpi-merge-upstream-20260526-112053/02-blocked-status.txt

goals.title: Render apply_patch events in TUI
goals.objective: Implement TUI real-time rendering for apply_patch-style tool events in /Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/senpi, using an extension if feasible otherwise a minimal source change. Success criteria: C1 happy path apply_patch-style tool event renders a live apply-patch UI in the TUI with RED/GREEN regression test evidence and tmux transcript; C2 empty or malformed patch payload does not crash and renders fallback/error state with RED/GREEN evidence and transcript; C3 ordinary non-apply_patch tool calls keep existing rendering with RED/GREEN evidence and transcript; C4 npm run check passes, local install succeeds, ssh mengmotaMac install succeeds, commit is pushed.

successCriteria.scenario: Happy path: an apply_patch-style tool event rendered by the TUI shows a live apply-patch summary/diff surface, equivalent in intent to the built-in apply patch UI.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Automated test written before implementation: packages/coding-agent/test/suite/regressions/tui-apply-patch-rendering.test.ts test id 'renders apply patch tool calls with live patch summary'. Capture RED output with assertion message before production change and GREEN output after. Manual QA: tmux transcript from real pi TUI showing apply_patch event rendered with file/action summary.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: RED: /tmp/senpi-tui-apply-patch-20260527/01-red-tui-apply-patch-rendering.txt failed assertion 'apply_patch call should render the live apply-patch surface'. GREEN: /tmp/senpi-tui-apply-patch-20260527/02-green-tui-apply-patch-rendering.txt and /tmp/senpi-tui-apply-patch-20260527/05-green-after-typefix.txt pass. Manual QA: /tmp/senpi-tui-apply-patch-20260527/07-tmux-tui-surface.txt shows Applying patch, Edited sample.txt, + after.

successCriteria.scenario: Edge/malformed: empty, non-string, or malformed apply_patch payloads are rendered without throwing and show a concise fallback/error state in the TUI.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Automated test written before implementation: packages/coding-agent/test/suite/regressions/tui-apply-patch-rendering.test.ts test id 'renders malformed apply patch payload without crashing'. Capture RED output with assertion message before production change and GREEN output after. Manual QA: real CLI/TUI transcript showing malformed apply_patch payload handled without process crash.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: RED: /tmp/senpi-tui-apply-patch-20260527/01-red-tui-apply-patch-rendering.txt failed assertion 'malformed apply_patch input should render an error fallback'. GREEN: /tmp/senpi-tui-apply-patch-20260527/02-green-tui-apply-patch-rendering.txt and /tmp/senpi-tui-apply-patch-20260527/05-green-after-typefix.txt pass. Manual QA: /tmp/senpi-tui-apply-patch-20260527/07-tmux-tui-surface.txt shows Invalid patch stream and expected *** Begin Patch parser message without crash.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression/install: ordinary non-apply_patch tool calls keep existing renderer output, adjacent renderer/apply-confirmation functions do not regress, npm run check passes, local install works, ssh mengmotaMac install works, and the commit is pushed.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Automated tests written before implementation: packages/coding-agent/test/suite/regressions/tui-apply-patch-rendering.test.ts test id 'keeps ordinary tool call rendering unchanged', plus adjacent existing renderer test if present. Capture RED output with assertion message before production change and GREEN output after. Manual QA: CLI/TUI transcript or snapshot showing ordinary tool call rendering, full npm run check stdout, local install stdout and smoke output, ssh mengmotaMac install stdout and smoke output, pushed commit SHA.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omo/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
